fields.name: Action
fields.description: Fast-paced games focused on physical challenges, reflexes, and hand-eye coordination.

fields.name: Adventure
fields.description: Games focused on exploration, puzzle-solving, and narrative-driven experiences.

fields.name: RPG
fields.description: Role-playing games where players assume the roles of characters in a fictional setting.

fields.name: Platform
fields.description: Games where the player controls a character jumping between platforms and avoiding obstacles.

fields.name: First-Person Shooter
fields.description: Shooter games played from a first-person perspective.

fields.name: Fighting
fields.description: Combat games where two or more players fight each other using special moves and combos.

fields.name: Puzzle
fields.description: Games that emphasize problem solving, including logic, pattern recognition, and word completion.

fields.name: Sports
fields.description: Games that simulate the practice of traditional physical sports.

fields.name: Racing
fields.description: Games where the player participates in racing competitions with vehicles or characters.

fields.name: Strategy
fields.description: Games that require planning and skillful thinking to achieve victory.

fields.name: Survival Horror
fields.description: Games that focus on survival against terrifying enemies in a horror setting.

fields.name: Simulation
fields.description: Games that simulate real-world activities or systems.

fields.name: Sandbox
fields.description: Open-world games that provide players with freedom to explore and create.
